title: verbascum × diphyon
intro: Verbascum × diphyon, also known as the mullein-leaved verbascum, is a hybrid plant that combines characteristics of Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum lychnitis, two species of flowering plants in the mullein genus. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × diphyon include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to help manage stress and promote restful sleep. Verbascum × diphyon is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
